hints.text: Roads: **yellow outer lines**, middle white or yellow (also Jordan/Israel/Oman)
Gen3 **white car w/ black roof racks** (only ME country with a white car); Gen4 = white pickup trekker (antenna centred; Qatar's is left) + a black car
Arabic + lots of **English** (tourism; also Qatar/Oman, but not Jordan)
Houses **light-coloured stone** (reddish sidewalk stones); **black-and-white striped signposts** (also Oman) + striped curbs
Electricity poles = **dark brown wood, 3 insulators on a horizontal bar** (Oman similar; Jordan = grey concrete, more spaced)
Despite the wealth, residential roads are often **unpaved**; rifts occasionally appear
Coverage mostly **NE**; **Dubai** skyscrapers (Burj Khalifa) + blue street signs; mountains only in the far east (Ras al Khaimah)
